data.content: Plan approved for implementation. The scope is correctly limited to display-label rendering in Settings > Agents, preserving option ids and selected values. Updating buildModelLabelDisplayMap() to prefer the last slash-delimited token with collision-safe fallback addresses the OpenCode label issue without widening behavior changes. Removing truncation in the scanned-agent combobox is appropriate for meeting the full-label visibility requirement. The proposed tests for model-labels and settings-agents-scanned cover the acceptance criteria and the main ambiguity risk.
